reason: Customer received wrong items — got two Spanish-language books (Viktor Frankl and Brian Weiss) instead of the ordered computer science textbooks (Introduction to Algorithms and The Art of Computer Programming).
summary: Customer received completely wrong books (Spanish-language titles instead of computer science textbooks) for order BK-1003 ($389.95). They need the books by Monday and are requesting a full refund since they can't wait for a replacement. Customer is a Gold loyalty member since March 2021 with $1,240 annual spend.
procedure: Given his loyalty status, offer an immediate replacement with 15% off, without waiting to receive the wrong items first. Include expedited shipping at no cost so the customer receives the correct books before their class. If the customer prefers a regular return instead, proceed without any pushback.
